columns.description:
Positive integer number of equal-width columns or a full CSS
`grid-template-columns` value.
Numeric values render as `repeat(<columns>, minmax(0, 1fr))`.

rowGap.description: Row gap override. Wins over `gap` for rows.

columnGap.description: Column gap override. Wins over `gap` for columns.

collapse.description:
Enables a narrow-screen fallback where BentoGrid becomes a single column
and BentoCell placement resets to auto flow.
